web.markdown:
[Skip to content](https://lamarebayharbor.com/#wp--skip-link--target)

![](https://lamarebayharbor.com/wp-content/themes/LaMare/assets/images/Regency-LaMare-03-9927_Bldg_Hero_Dusk-01@2x.png)

# Space & Comfort Reimagined

## Luxury Waterfront Residences In Bay Harbor Islands

### A TRANQUIL ESCAPE RIGHT AT HOME

La Maré Residences offer an exclusive collection of boutique luxury condominiums in Bay Harbor Islands, Miami. With spacious layouts, waterfront views, and refined design, these new residences deliver timeless elegance and a lifestyle of coastal serenity.

[DOWNLOAD FACT SHEET](https://lamarebayharbor.com/downloads)

## Regency Collection

### Boutique Waterfront Living with Panoramic Bay Views and Resort-Style Amenities

Located at 9927 East Bay Harbor Drive, the Regency Collection is an 8-story boutique waterfront building featuring 33 expansive 2- to 4-bedroom residences. Each home is designed with wrap-around, floor-to-ceiling glass walls that showcase sweeping panoramic views of Biscayne Bay. Residents enjoy access to a private marina and an elevated rooftop pool deck—perfect for refined, coastal living in Bay Harbor Islands.

[Explore The Regency Collection](https://lamarebayharbor.com/regency-collection)

![](https://lamarebayharbor.com/wp-content/themes/LaMare/assets/images/regency.png)

![](https://lamarebayharbor.com/wp-content/themes/LaMare/assets/images/Group%2015072@2x.png)

## Signature Collection

### Elevated Living. Private Spaces. Uncompromised Design.

Just nine exclusive residences make up the Signature Collection at 9781 East Bay Harbor Drive—an 8-story, glass-clad waterfront building offering unmatched privacy and expansive living. These 2- to 4-bedroom homes feature panoramic bay views from every residence, spacious terraces for seamless indoor-outdoor living, and private plunge pools that redefine luxury in Bay Harbor Islands.

[Explore The Signature Collection](https://lamarebayharbor.com/signature-collection)

## Bay Collection

### The Pinnacle of Waterfront Luxury with the Best Views in Bay Harbor Islands

Situated at 10301 East Bay Harbor Drive, the Bay Collection features just nine exclusive residences in a boutique 8-story building. Floor-to-ceiling, wrap-around glass walls create an immersive waterfront experience, offering the most dramatic panoramic bay views available. Each home includes access to a private marina, a rooftop pool deck, and the ultimate in peaceful privacy.

[Explore The Bay Collection](https://lamarebayharbor.com/bay-collection)

![](https://lamarebayharbor.com/wp-content/themes/LaMare/assets/images/Group%20152335@2x.png)

## At La Maré, the lifestyle is as curated as the residences. Spacious interiors, designer elements, and water-inspired design principles create an environment that is both luxurious and tranquil. Enjoy island living with elevated comfort, custom finishes, and refined amenities.

![](https://lamarebayharbor.com/wp-content/themes/LaMare/assets/images/home-regency-1.webp)Regency Collection![](https://lamarebayharbor.com/wp-content/themes/LaMare/assets/images/home-regency-2.webp)Regency Collection![](https://lamarebayharbor.com/wp-content/themes/LaMare/assets/images/home-regency-3.webp)Regency Collection![](https://lamarebayharbor.com/wp-content/themes/LaMare/assets/images/home-signature.webp)Signature Collection![](https://lamarebayharbor.com/wp-content/themes/LaMare/assets/images/home-bay.webp)Bay Collection![](https://lamarebayharbor.com/wp-content/themes/LaMare/assets/images/home-regency-1.webp)Regency Collection![](https://lamarebayharbor.com/wp-content/themes/LaMare/assets/images/home-regency-2.webp)Regency Collection![](https://lamarebayharbor.com/wp-content/themes/LaMare/assets/images/home-regency-3.webp)Regency Collection![](https://lamarebayharbor.com/wp-content/themes/LaMare/assets/images/home-signature.webp)Signature Collection![](https://lamarebayharbor.com/wp-content/themes/LaMare/assets/images/home-bay.webp)Bay Collection

### A ONE-OF-KIND NEIGHBORHOOD

## Bay Harbor Islands is one of Miami’s most exclusive enclaves, offering an ideal blend of peaceful island atmosphere and close proximity to Bal Harbour, Surfside, and Miami Beach. La Maré places you minutes from world-class dining, shopping, beaches, and cultural hotspots—bringing both tranquility and excitement to your doorstep.

[Explore Location](https://lamarebayharbor.com/location)

![](https://lamarebayharbor.com/wp-content/themes/LaMare/assets/images/home-location-4.webp)![](https://lamarebayharbor.com/wp-content/themes/LaMare/assets/images/home-location-3.webp)![](https://lamarebayharbor.com/wp-content/themes/LaMare/assets/images/home-location-2.webp)![](https://lamarebayharbor.com/wp-content/themes/LaMare/assets/images/home-location-1.webp)![](https://lamarebayharbor.com/wp-content/themes/LaMare/assets/images/home-location-5.webp)![](https://lamarebayharbor.com/wp-content/themes/LaMare/assets/images/home-location-4.webp)![](https://lamarebayharbor.com/wp-content/themes/LaMare/assets/images/home-location-3.webp)![](https://lamarebayharbor.com/wp-content/themes/LaMare/assets/images/home-location-2.webp)![](https://lamarebayharbor.com/wp-content/themes/LaMare/assets/images/home-location-1.webp)![](https://lamarebayharbor.com/wp-content/themes/LaMare/assets/images/home-location-5.webp)

### Exclusive Marina Access

The private boat slips at the La Maré Residences Bay Harbor Islands are an excellent departure point for adventure.

[Explore Amenities](https://lamarebayharbor.com/service-and-amenities)

![](https://lamarebayharbor.com/wp-content/themes/LaMare/assets/images/simon-goetz.png)

# La Mare Signature

### **Bay Harbor Islands / 2026**

7 Stories / 9 Residences of
2 to 4 Bedrooms Bedrooms

**9781 E Bay Harbor Dr, Bay Harbor Islands, FL 33154, USA**

Average Price: $1,200 x SF ($12,917 x M2)

La Mare Signature Bay Harbor Islands is a serene 7-story waterfront residential condo, offering luxurious rooftop amenities. All 9 residences have interiors created by designer Debora Aguiar. The modern stucture design is a masterpiece by Kobi Karp. Its expansive terraces bring in natural light and air.
La Mare Signature is conveniently located in Bay Harbor Islands. You'll live just moments away to Miami Beach, Downtown, and Bal Harbour Shops.

[1 Condo For Sale](https://miamiresidential.com/lamaresignature/#ForSale) from $5,500,000

Average Price: $1,200 x SF ($12,917 x M2)

## Features

### Building Features

- Beautifully landscaped bayfront shoreline
- 8 stories with an exclusive collection of just 9 expansive,
and light-filled residences, all featuring bay views
- Large glass-walled terraces perfect for entertaining
- 2- to 4-bedroom floor plan layouts ranging from 2,100 to over 4,200 sq. ft.
- Secured parking garage with ample parking
- Private boat slips available for residents
- Welcoming entry lobby and lounge
- Convenient private storage rooms for each residence
- Bayfront outdoor space with landscaping, boat slips, and lounge areas
- Landscaped resort-like rooftop pool deck with pool, jacuzzi, lounge chairs, daybeds, outdoor kitchen, and bar/lounge

### Residence Features

- Elegant, grand ceiling heights
- Panoramic bay views through floor-to-ceiling windows
- Semi-private and private elevators bring residents directly
to their homes with a key-lock system
- Custom Poliform kitchens with stone countertops featuring
top-of-the-line Miele appliance suite, including a coffee system and wine fridge
- Dual shower and deep soaking tub in primary bathrooms
- Elegant Italian fixtures in kitchens and bathrooms by Antonio Lupi

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/12-La-Mare-Signature-Pool.jpg)

## Developers

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/03/Developers-Regency-Development.jpg)

Regency Development Group is a family-run development firm founded in Chicago, Illilnois; it was founded by Alex Troyanovsky. This team works with experienced architects and industry profesionals, delivering unique concepts. They focus on customer’s real needs, such as space, comfort, elegance and community.

## Latest News

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/113-MR.jpg)

### La Mare Bay Harbor Islands construction continues to advance

Across both the Regency and Signature Collection at La Mare, the developer vision is coming to life. Contact us now for the latest inventory of these amazing waterfront boutique towers.

Updated on: 07/09/2025
